assistant.followUp1: Review the client's reflective homework on tracking and categorizing daily habits.
assistant.followUp2: Discuss practical strategies for habit change and reinforcement based on psychoeducation.
assistant.followUp3: Monitor any shifts in well-being or relational dynamics since the last session.
assistant.lastSessionText: The client explored the role of habits in shaping identity, showing curiosity about neuroplasticity and habit formation. They differentiated between immediate goal-based and identity-based habits, demonstrating insight and readiness for change. No progress on prior goals was reported, but engagement and self-reflection were strong.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Unozen

whatIsZenAssistant.question: What is the Zen Assistant?
whatIsZenAssistant.answer: The Zen Assistant is an AI-powered clinical assistant that helps you during therapy sessions. It can provide real-time suggestions, review session notes, suggest interventions, and draft documentation. Simply select a client and open the Zen Assistant from the home page to start chatting.

howToStartSession.question: How do I start a new session?
howToStartSession.answer: To start a new session, go to the Home page, select a client from the dropdown menu, choose a template (like Individual Therapy), and click the 'Start Session' button. You can also upload pre-recorded audio files by clicking the dropdown arrow next to the Start Session button.

whatAreTemplates.question: What are templates and how do I use them?
whatAreTemplates.answer: Templates are pre-structured note formats that help you document therapy sessions consistently. You can use built-in templates like Individual Therapy, Couples Therapy, or create your own custom templates. Visit the Templates page to browse Zen Templates or build your own from scratch using the Template Builder.

howToUseAssistant.question: How do I use the AI Assistant during a session?
howToUseAssistant.answer: Open the Zen Assistant panel by clicking the 'Zen Assistant' button on the home page after selecting a client. You can type questions or use voice input to ask about session notes, homework assignments, intervention suggestions, or request help drafting progress notes. The assistant provides real-time responses based on your client's history.

isDataSecure.question: Is my client data secure?
isDataSecure.answer: Yes, all client data is encrypted and stored securely. We follow industry-standard security practices and comply with healthcare privacy regulations. Your session notes, client information, and all communications are protected with enterprise-grade security measures.

canIExportNotes.question: Can I export my session notes?
canIExportNotes.answer: Yes, you can export session notes in various formats. Navigate to any session detail page and use the export options to download notes as PDF, Word documents, or other formats. This makes it easy to share notes with colleagues or maintain offline records.

howVoiceInputWorks.question: How does voice input work?
howVoiceInputWorks.answer: Voice input uses your browser's built-in speech recognition. Click the microphone button in the chat interface to start speaking. Your speech is converted to text in real-time. Note that voice input requires Chrome or Edge browsers and works best in quiet environments. Click the stop button when you're done speaking.

whatIsPricing.question: What are the pricing plans?
whatIsPricing.answer: Unozen offers flexible pricing plans to suit different practice sizes. Visit the Pricing page to see detailed information about our Free, Professional, and Enterprise plans. Each plan includes different features and client limits. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time.
